title: アオハル杯5戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's the day of the Unity Cup finals! We
head toward our last challenge as one.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wowzers! We did it! We made it through to the
final match!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I c-can't believe it! That means we're up against
Team Zenith! That's a big yikes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We work our way up through the tournament until
all that remains is to face Team Zenith in the
grand final!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've already filled my team in on everything that's
been going on with Team Zenith lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all our preparations complete, we head off
to the final match, but on the way there, a loud
voice from the grounds catches our attention.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
1,000 meters in 63.9 seconds! You're going too
slow! You're the one who said you were gonna
destroy your target time, so run like you mean it!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I wonder if she's trying to beat the target time
she talked about before?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No way! How could she have improved so much in
so little time?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon's face is flushed with exertion as she
tries to lower her time with all her might.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow... Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Y-you've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all fall silent as we watch her sprint furiously
down the track.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
1,000 meters left! You've just passed 2 minutes
3.5 seconds! You're on track for a new record,
Little Cocon! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon flies down the track with incredible
speed. She turns the fourth corner...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And blasts past the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Judging from the triumphant cheers that erupt, I
can only assume she's beaten her target time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My team is struck speechless for a moment by the
display.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Holy moly!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
She really managed to smash her record! And all
for Ms. Kashimoto!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: T-Team Zenith is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing Rice Shower's comment, Taiki
Shuttle clenches her fists tightly.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I've... I've made up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're winning the Unity Cup! I absolutely don't
wanna lose today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith is mega incredible... But that's
exactly why it'll be worth beatin' 'em!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I wanna face 'em head-on and defeat 'em with all
our combined strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole team's faces light up at Taiki Shuttle's
bold declaration.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Yes, I can sense it! I feel a joyful power
blossoming between us and Team Zenith!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's reward our most wonderful rivals with our
best performance yet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just know that happiness is waiting for us at the
end of all this!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, races are super fun when you get to run in
them with the friends you've been training hard
with!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's have fun and win! First place is ours! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I want to win too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how amazing they are really ignites
something in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A scarce few hours after this rousing call to
victory, the final match of the Unity Cup begins!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y'all ready? Happy Hoppers...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough warming up! Time to get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y'all ready? Sunny Runners...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough warming up! Time to get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y'all ready? Carrot Pudding...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough warming up! Time to get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y'all ready? Blue Bloom...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough warming up! Time to get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Y'all ready? Team Carrot...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough warming up! Time to get a
move on!

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
The other team looks pretty fired up. They
haven't been slacking either.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Yeah, they look loads better than before! Loads better... but we can take them!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
'Cause we're getting better by the second too.
We're determined and focused, and we've been
practicing harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We have to win this. We'll win... and finally bring
this farce to an end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch over the teams from the stands, I spot
a familiar face nearby.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Here's to a good race today.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Though I'm not sure if I'm in any position to greet
you right now...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So you're aware.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I was only so strict because I wanted to protect
them... I didn't mean to demoralize them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I really am an awful trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know how much Team Zenith looks up to and
admires Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why else would they work so hard to beat their
target times?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell Ms. Kashimoto what I saw this morning.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Little Cocon surpassed her target time?!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's impossible... How could she have done that
in such a short period?
choice_data_list:
They're giving it everything they've got for your
sake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I saw how they reacted when Director Akikawa
told us about Ms. Kashimoto's past, and I saw the
fire in their eyes this morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It couldn't be clearer how highly Team Zenith
regards Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be safe to say that they see her as the best
trainer in the world.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: You say that, but...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can't trust myself anymore. I learned nothing
from my past, and now my mistakes are playing
out all over again...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps it would be best if I cut my ties with
Umamusume and the racing world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto looks down with a weary sigh. I
notice there are bags under her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing about her past, I thought it would
be impossible to change Ms. Kashimoto's values.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I can help in my own way.
choice_data_list: It's too early to lose faith in yourself yet.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: What are you saying?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although micromanaging Umamusume may keep
them safe, it can also stunt their potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the flip side, leaving them wholly to their own
devices can lead to terrible accidents with
irreversible consequences.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's best to be watchful but not
overbearing. You should let them be free but
always be ready to intervene if they're in danger.
choice_data_list: That's what being a trainer is to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto looks out on the track with a
conflicted expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I still don't know if what you say is
really the right way to do things...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Let me judge for myself from how these races
unfold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Ms. Kashimoto's gaze to where the
members of Team Zenith are diligently doing
their warm-ups.
